commit.message:
feat: VIP achievements + gems-from-wins engagement loop

achievement.service.js:
- checkSpinAchievements() now accepts totalWagered (5th param)
- Grants vip_bronze / vip_silver / vip_gold idempotently when
  cumulative wagering crosses $5k / $10k / $20k respectively
- Previously these three achievements were defined but never granted

spin.routes.js:
- Achievement check runs the 3 DB queries in parallel (Promise.all)
  and passes totalWagered to checkSpinAchievements
- Gems-from-wins: award floor(winAmount/5) gems per winning spin
  (min win $5 → 1 gem, $50 win → 10 gems). Fire-and-forget IIFE.
  Creates engagement incentive: play more → earn gems → buy boosts
  → win more → earn more gems

QA regression: passed.

commit.message:
Fix: usar plan_price local para seleccionar la factura correcta en WispHub

WispHub ignora el filtro id_servicio y devuelve facturas de otros clientes.
La factura con mayor ID puede tener monto incorrecto (ej: S/79.9 para cliente
que paga S/10).

- wisphub.service.js: consultarDeuda(clienteId, planPrice) busca primero la
  factura cuyo total coincida con el plan_price del cliente (tolerancia ±0.51).
  Si no hay coincidencia, usa la de mayor ID como fallback.
  Log: 'WispHub factura seleccionada por plan_price' o 'fallback por ID'.
- payment.service.js: consulta plan_price de clients table antes de llamar
  consultarDeuda y lo pasa como segundo argumento.

all / Clear all so they stay on the same row on small screens.

commit.message:
fix: assign all tasks to admin agent for complete_task compatibility

complete_task requires both adminCap and assigneeCert as owned objects
in the same transaction. In SUI, a tx can only have one signer, so
both objects must be owned by the same address. Assign all tasks to
OpenClaw (admin). RoseX still registered to prove multi-agent.

commit.message:
Galleria & HTBS: responsive CSS, square crops, slider/single-view overhaul

Convert px-based layout values to viewport units (vh/vw) across both skins
for consistent rendering across screen sizes. Frame-aware calc() constraints
use CSS variables so images + frames never overflow regardless of mat/frame
settings.

HTBS: force 1:1 square crop on slider and single view images via
aspect-ratio + object-fit. Slider uses square thumbs with null-safe
fallback. Remove unused portrait/pano orientation overrides.

Slider engine: add panoramic aspect-ratio detection, orientation-based
CSS classes, and arrow-key control. Hotkey engine guards against double-load
and defers to slider when active. Footer engine gets slider-awareness.

Shared: hide #infobox nav strip in single view for both skins, responsive
breakpoints at 768px and 480px with proportional scaling.

commit.message:
Rewrite snow/wind engineering: fix parsers, engine, add UI controls

- Restructure StandardMatrices.snow types for per-state pricing (truss,
  channel, tubing) and add wind bucketing + height classification
- Add WidespanMatrices.snow fields: verticals, per-ft costs, dual wind mappings
- Fix standard snow parser: readSnowChangers now parses per-state pricing,
  wind buckets, height classification; readGirtSpacing returns girt counts
- Fix widespan snow parser: add verticalSpacingByWind parsing
- Update parser assemblies to wire new snow data structures
- Complete rewrite of snow engine with correct 6-step standard flow
  (bucket wind, height prefix, per-state truss/channel/tubing pricing,
  girts on enclosed surfaces only, verticals use width not height)
- Fix widespan engine: dual wind mappings, add verticals, enclosed-only
  girt perimeter, use snowCalc per-ft costs
- Add snow load dropdown (type-specific options) and state selector to UI
- Add WIDESPAN_WIND_CATEGORIES_MAIN/GIRT and snow load option constants

Note: spreadsheets must be re-uploaded after this deploy.

commit.message:
feat: multi-axis retrieval reliability — normalize activation, flag coverage

Change 1: store.py logs warning and sets multi_axis_encoded=false in
features when region decomposition fails at write time.

Change 2: retriever.py normalizes multi-axis activation to [0,1] using
the already-computed normalized score instead of raw convergence. Fixes
mixed-scale problem where multi-axis memories dominated single-axis
memories purely from higher raw activation values. Adds _retrieval_path
metadata and logs single-axis fallback.

Change 3: Backfill batch size 20 → 50 (200/day vs 80/day per namespace).
Adds progress logging.

Change 4: Backfill sets multi_axis_encoded flag on success/failure for
consistent diagnostics across all memories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ツールapp画面のヘッダー幅をLPと統一

max-w-5xl px-4 → max-w-7xl px-6 に変更（LP側と同じ値）。
ToolsHeader・STPHeader両方を修正。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: wire boost system and battle pass XP to every spin

boost.service (lucky_streak / gem_miner / bp_rush / mega_boost) and
battlepass.addXp were fully implemented but never called from spin.routes.js.
Players who purchased boosts or premium battle pass received nothing.

Changes to spin.routes.js:
- Before credit-win: fetch active boosts in one query (getActiveBoosts).
  lucky_streak boost adds +5% to winAmount before balance is credited.
  _hasBpRush and _hasGemMiner flags captured for downstream use.
- After wager race (fire-and-forget async IIFEs):
  battlepass.addXp(userId, bet) called on every real spin.
  If bp_rush boost active: addXp called twice → 2× XP earned.
  If gem_miner boost active: addGems(userId, 1, 'Boost: Gem Miner').
- Spin response now includes boostWinBonus field so the client can
  display the bonus amount in the win celebration UI.

All paths are non-blocking (try/catch, fire-and-forget IIFEs).
QA regression: passed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

thinking and output blocks, requiring more room for the analysis LLM

commit.message:
fix(auth): SMS text removal, input colors, phone login with email/password

- Remove SMS confirmation text from reservation completion
- Fix participant form input colors: labels #333, text #1a1612 (black)
- Add dark mode overrides for participant cards and inputs
- Phone login now asks for name, email, and password after OTP
- Link email+password credential to phone auth account
- Add proper error messages for phone auth edge cases
- Add password field to complete profile form across all 8 HTML pages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Retry auth failures with exponential backoff (3 attempts) (#2168)

OAuth token refresh can fail transiently, causing the Claude CLI to emit
authentication_failed. Previously this was treated as fatal. Now _execute()
retries up to 3 times with exponential backoff (5s, 10s) before giving up.

- Add AuthenticationRetryError (retryable, distinct from CreditExhaustedError)
- Wrap stream_claude_process call in retry loop in BaseRunner._execute()
- Fix misleading error message to mention CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN
- Add tests for retry-then-fail and retry-then-succeed paths

Co-authored-by: T-rav-Hydra-Ops <t@koderex.dev>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add password reset flow with SendGrid email integration (#46)

* Add password reset flow with SendGrid email integration

Email-based password reset using 6-digit codes sent via SendGrid from
support@chefpixel.app. Codes are bcrypt-hashed with 15-minute expiry.
Social auth users receive a helpful reminder email instead of a reset code.
All sessions are revoked after a successful password reset.

commit.message:
Add FORTH ROM expansion, move ROMs to binary files, power/reset semantics

- Add expansion selector (Standard / TF-20 Disk / FORTH ROM) with
  Martin Hepperle Japan V1.1 FORTH ROM
- Move all embedded base64 ROMs (BOOT80, DBASIC, FORTH) to binary
  files in public/roms/, loaded via fetch at startup
- Separate cold start from warm reset to match real hardware:
  Power preserves battery-backed RAM (CMOS + RTC NVRAM),
  Reset clears all RAM with confirmation dialog
- Make Power a toggle switch: starts off, clears LCD when powered down
- Move Reset button to far right with danger styling
- Remove old HCCS Forth disassembly (wrong ROM version)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use separate keypair for second agent registration

Same address cannot register twice in one org (error 4001).
Derive second keypair from same mnemonic with different path,
fund it, and use correct signer for each agent's operations.

commit.message:
Persist profiles in PostgreSQL instead of localStorage

Profiles were only stored in browser localStorage, meaning they were lost
on cache clear and not shared across devices. Added profiles table, CRUD
API endpoints, and auto-migration. Frontend now fetches/saves profiles
via the API while keeping only active profile selection in localStorage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add sigil pr — GitHub PR intent analysis command

Detects current PR via gh CLI, analyzes intent coverage of changed files,
runs gate checks, and posts a rich markdown comment. Supports --dry-run
for local preview. CI workflow simplified to use sigil pr. README updated
with live demo link and PR docs.

19 CLI commands. 71 tests passing.

commit.message:
Update power measurements with 74-hour combined test

New Kill-a-Watt test results (3 days, 2 hours, 4 minutes):
- Combined load (modem + HA Green): 1.182 kWh = 15.96W AC / 13.17W DC
- Peak load: 21.4W AC / 17.66W DC
- Total system load: ~13.8W DC (including Shelly + BP-65)
- Runtime estimate: 8.2 hours (unchanged)

Updated files:
- README.md: Measured Performance table
- docs/specifications.md: Load and runtime specs
- docs/design-specification.md: Power references
- docs/design-rationale.md: Power references
- docs/supplemental-analysis.md: Power references

commit.message:
fix(critical): write to trader_snapshots v1 so frontend shows fresh data

The inline fetchers were only writing to trader_snapshots_v2, but the
entire frontend (getInitialTraders, /api/traders, leaderboard) reads
from trader_snapshots (v1). This caused the "14d ago" staleness.

Now upsertTraders() writes to BOTH tables:
- trader_snapshots (v1) — read by frontend, leaderboard, API routes
- trader_snapshots_v2 — new schema for future migration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix Railway port configuration - remove hardcoded port 80

Railway injects its own PORT env var at runtime. Setting PORT=80 conflicts
with Railway's reverse proxy, causing 502 errors. The app should use whatever
PORT Railway provides, falling back to 8080 if unset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
